subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Render thanks unto God that in thy familiar homeland thou art occupied in service to the All-Merciful Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان حمد کن خدا را که در وطن مالوف بخدمت رب روف مالوفی و مانند
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
